problem id: f43f6142
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(3) AND SHL(6)) XOR ROT(6)

examples:
  11001010 -> 10110010
  01110100 -> 00011101
  10101001 -> 00101010
  00001001 -> 00000010
  00010110 -> 00000101
  01100101 -> 01011001
  01000011 -> 11010000
  11110000 -> 00111100
  11011000 -> 00110110

query: 11110111
predicted answer: 01111101
